utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. In the final solution, items present are: selected_property (maps to property), financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget — so 6 items appeared. Now check if fully specified: 
- property: Requires 'selected property with details and price'. Provided: name, location, listing_price, features — sufficient. 
- financing: Requires 'financing solution with terms'. Provided: option, LTV, down_payment amount, arrangement fee, notes/alternative — sufficient terms. 
- legal_services: Requires 'legal services with costs'. Provided: basic_package, cost_estimate, notes — sufficient. 
- moving_services: Requires 'moving arrangements with costs'. Provided: moving package, cost_estimate, notes with alternative — sufficient. 
- setup_services: Requires 'utility and setup services'. Provided: utilities_setup with package and cost — sufficient. 
- total_budget: Requires 'complete cost breakdown'. Provided: property_cost, down_payment, additional_fees (itemized in parentheses), overall_estimate — sufficiently complete. All 6 are covered and fully specified.
